title: HATE full implementation readiness gate

residual_risks.scenario: Local advisory artifact readiness is mistaken for hosted SaaS runtime availability.

reasons: P0a executable CLI, minimal adapters, DQ negative fixtures, and execution evidence exist.
P0b QEG export and edge hardening exist with visible missing execution gap, risk debt, and manual-bb bridge.
P1a implementation exists with AETE score, doctor report, artifact resolver map, identity, retry aggregation, replay, compare, explain, recommendation, and adapter conformance artifacts.
P1b implementation exists with RanD alignment, Shipyard advisory evidence, workflow task seed, acceptance record, evidence JSONL, docs stale input, and Birdseye map artifacts.
P2/P3 implementation exists with product readiness, hosted read model index, enterprise metrics, customer docs, support diagnostic, privacy telemetry, and governance portfolio artifacts.
Current product readiness is conditional because the golden fixture preserves a doctor finding and unverified acceptance instead of hiding them.
The conditional_go verdict is limited to local/advisory artifact implementation scope and does not claim hosted SaaS runtime availability.
minimum_go_conditions: P0a CLI generates all required outputs from the golden fixture.
DQ negative fixtures reproduce expected decision and exit code.
Product-readiness-report and PRG metrics are generated.
Release and publish gate override fields remain false.
